user_consents.credential_boundary: User handles passwords, passkeys, SSNs, and 2FA directly in Chrome.

agent_tasks.description: Postgres production readiness approval parity task.

workflow_definitions.title: Eligibility and benefits navigation
workflow_definitions.description: Confirm plan, eligibility, benefit categories, balances, and source pointers from the payer portal.

workflow_definitions.title: Claim status navigation
workflow_definitions.description: Find claim records, status, dates, patient responsibility, and next payer/member actions.

workflow_definitions.title: Prior authorization navigation
workflow_definitions.description: Review prior authorization status, requirements, payer policy pointers, and approval-gated next steps.

workflow_definitions.title: Denial appeal preparation
workflow_definitions.description: Assemble denial facts, policy references, evidence checklist, and approval-gated appeal draft support.

workflow_definitions.title: Payer portal read-only extraction
workflow_definitions.description: Capture visible payer portal facts, links, screenshots/artifacts, and source pointers without credential entry.

workflow_definitions.title: Document or trace review
workflow_definitions.description: Review uploaded or locally captured artifacts and traces, extract structured evidence, and identify missing data.

workflow_definitions.title: Human approval escalation
workflow_definitions.description: Pause execution for user approval, missing credentials handled by the user, or high-risk external actions.

tool_registry.title: Local SQLite session and memory harness

openclaw_skills.title: Insurance portal browser
openclaw_skills.description: Navigate the user-authenticated payer portal, observe visible state, extract facts with source pointers, and stop before any irreversible action.

openclaw_skills.title: Insurance knowledge research
openclaw_skills.description: Retrieve payer, CMS, code-set, and authoritative web sources for workflow-specific questions with citation and freshness checks.

openclaw_skills.title: Heartbeat follow-up planner
openclaw_skills.description: Inspect pending jobs, due dates, open tasks, last context packet, and propose approval-gated next actions.
